title: OnOptions
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from OnOptions, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: In the $3 trillion private credit market, the ‘shadow default’ rate is increasing as more money chases lower-quality deals
items.description: A decline in interest rates offered by the Fed plus excessive demand for private credit investments has reduced yields for investors.

items.title: He Went Bankrupt Three Times. Then Milton Hershey Built a $50 Million Brand
